prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2ccd9fef`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `2ccd9fef`. The rule is: split the input into equal panels, treat the lowest-palette panel as the shared blank template, then extrapolate each signal color’s growth pattern to reconstruct the missing next panel. The solver handles both straight progressions and interleaved per-color subsequences like the alternating 5-panel case.

`arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for `2ccd9fef`, so no hint was used and no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added; all task-specific logic stays local in [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2ccd9fef/helpers.py), with the verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2ccd9fef/verifier.py), the generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2ccd9fef/generator.py), and wiring in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2ccd9fef/__init__.py). The generator mirrors the official family by sampling from four panel-progressions matching the observed vertical 3-panel and horizontal 3/5-panel layouts.

Validation: official train/test examples match exactly, `py_compile` passed, and `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 2ccd9fef --n-examples 1000` completed successfully. The artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2ccd9fef/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2ccd9fef/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2ccd9fef/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2ccd9fef/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2ccd9fef/previews/preview_03.png), and the 1000 generated examples under [examples/](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2ccd9fef/examples). A literal in-tool image open was not available in this interface, so I verified the preview outputs by file creation/metadata plus spot-checking generated examples from the built artifact set.
